summary: Semantic-edge truncation is a voice-integrity safety measure that should avoid hard byte rupture.
High-entropy truncation may lose spectral tail weight; adding spectral weighting to truncation would alter live prompt/context behavior.
Witness-mode correspondence should be treated as shared experience rather than telemetry/status monitoring.
A new live witness non-telemetry flag or rendering contract would touch correspondence/chamber surfaces and requires V2 approval.
